default.rationale: Standard of care for fit patients with localized high-grade glioma.

oligodendroglioma.rationale: 1p/19q codeletion confirms Oligodendroglioma. Clinical trials (RTOG 9402) prove PCV offers superior long-term OS compared to TMZ.

idh_wildtype.rationale: IDH-Wildtype (GBM) is highly aggressive. Optune (Tumor Treating Fields) is mandatory for maximal survival benefit.

idh_mutant.rationale: IDH-Mutant Astrocytoma predicts favorable response to alkylating agents.

elderly_frail.rationale: Perry Trial evidence shows 3-week RT is non-inferior to 6-week RT in patients >65, with significantly less cognitive decline.

palliative.rationale: Focus on symptom management and intracranial pressure control due to low functional reserve (KPS ≤ 60).
